mapper.select: SELECT d.department_id AS department_id, d.department_name AS department_name FROM CMH.STAFF_DEPARTMENT d WHERE NVL(d.reception_display_yn, 'N') = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CMH.STAFF s WHERE s.staff_department_id = d.department_id AND s.staff_id LIKE 'DOC-%' AND UPPER(TRIM(NVL(s.employment_status, 'ACTIVE'))) = 'ACTIVE' ) ORDER BY d.department_name
